1896030.name: OpenVTT
1896030.description: OpenVTT is a Virtual Tabletop platform that focuses on modularity and customization. That means for example that the handouts are customizable, allowing you to change and design your own handout designs. OpenVTT’s vision is to be a Virtual Tabletop for most if not all TTRPGS, offering a free version with the base functionalities needed by most and with a selection of Premium features, that as needed for a one-time price. Removing the hassle of having to pay high prices or monthly subscriptions, to play a simple pen and paper game digitally.
